observability.title: Live Observability
observability.subtitle: This page measures itself in real time. Edge latency, request rate, cache hit ratio, error rate, and Lighthouse, polled every four seconds.
observability.philosophyTitle: Why a portfolio with its own status page
observability.philosophyBody: If I cannot tell you how my own site is performing right now, why should you trust me to operate yours. This dashboard polls a metrics endpoint every four seconds and renders the numbers inline. The same pattern I would use for a production service: instrument the system, expose the signals, make the truth visible.

architecture.title: Architecture Case Study
architecture.subtitle: Why these choices, and how data flows through the system.
architecture.frontendBody: Next.js 14 App Router with React Server Components, streamed from Vercel Edge for low latency in Germany and globally.
architecture.apiBody: Route handlers using ISR for cached GitHub data, plus serverless functions for Supabase writes and AI streaming.
architecture.databaseBody: Supabase PostgreSQL with Row Level Security and Realtime subscriptions powers the global leaderboard.
architecture.deploymentBody: Vercel Edge Runtime with GitHub Actions enforcing type check, lint, and build on every push.
